home.heroSubtitle: DeepContact is an AI-powered voicebot that transforms the customer service experience. Instant responses, 24/7 availability, and natural conversations.
home.featuresSubtitle: Our platform combines the latest in conversational AI to deliver an unmatched experience.
home.feature1Desc: Our voicebot understands and responds in natural language, delivering fluid and human-like conversations with your customers.
home.feature2Desc: Serve your customers at any time of the day with no wait times. Always ready, always available.
home.feature3Desc: Support in multiple languages to serve customers worldwide without communication barriers.
home.feature4Desc: Dashboard with detailed metrics on every interaction, customer satisfaction, and bot performance.
home.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to revolutionize your customer service.
home.step1Desc: Connect DeepContact to your communication channels and customize responses for your business.
home.step2Desc: Feed the voicebot with your knowledge base. The AI learns and improves with every interaction.
home.step3Desc: Activate the voicebot and start serving customers automatically and intelligently.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your customer service?
home.ctaDesc: Join the companies already trusting DeepContact to deliver an exceptional experience.

about.heroSubtitle: We are the bridge between artificial intelligence and human customer service.
about.missionText: At DeepContact we believe every customer deserves fast, accurate, and personalized service. Our mission is to democratize access to conversational AI technology so businesses of any size can deliver a world-class support experience.
about.visionText: To be the leading intelligent voicebot platform in Latin America, transforming the way companies communicate with their customers through natural AI-powered conversations.
about.storyText: DeepContact was born from frustration with traditional customer service systems: long waits, robotic menus, and generic answers. Our team of engineers and AI specialists set out to build something better: a voicebot that truly understands and resolves.
about.value1Desc: We are constantly evolving, incorporating the latest advances in natural language processing and machine learning.
about.value2Desc: Technology should bring people closer, not push them apart. We design every interaction with the human experience in mind.
about.value3Desc: We believe in clarity. Our clients always know how our AI works and how their data is used.
about.value4Desc: We don't settle for good enough. We strive to exceed expectations in every interaction and every line of code.
about.teamSubtitle: A multidisciplinary team passionate about AI and customer experience.

contact.heroSubtitle: We're ready to help. Write to us and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or inquiry...
contact.successMessage: Message sent successfully. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorMessage: There was an error sending your message. Please try again.
contact.invalidEmailMessage: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.faq1Question: How long does it take to implement DeepContact?
contact.faq1Answer: A basic implementation can be ready in 48 hours. More complex setups with custom integrations may take 1 to 2 weeks.
contact.faq2Question: Do I need technical knowledge to use the platform?
contact.faq2Answer: No. DeepContact is designed to be intuitive. Our team guides you through the entire setup and training process.
contact.faq3Question: Do you offer a free trial?
contact.faq3Answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all platform features.

howPage.heroSubtitle: Discover step by step how our voicebot transforms your company's customer service.
howPage.overviewText: DeepContact uses advanced artificial intelligence to process and understand your customers' natural language. From the very first interaction, the voicebot analyzes intent, finds the best response, and learns from every conversation to continuously improve.
howPage.step1Text: Integrate DeepContact with your existing communication channels: phone, WhatsApp, web chat, or social media. Our control panel lets you configure conversation flows, set business hours, and customize the tone and style of responses to match your brand identity.
howPage.step1Detail1: Integration with telephony and messaging APIs
howPage.step1Detail2: Visual panel to design conversation flows
howPage.step2Subtitle: Teach your voicebot about your business
howPage.step2Text: Upload your knowledge base: documents, FAQs, product manuals, and support guides. DeepContact's AI processes all this information and builds a response model specific to your company. The more information you provide, the more accurate it becomes.
howPage.step2Detail1: Bulk upload of documents and FAQs
howPage.step3Text: With a single click, activate the voicebot across all your channels. DeepContact starts handling inquiries immediately, escalating to human agents only when necessary. Monitor performance in real time from the dashboard.
howPage.tech1Desc: State-of-the-art NLP models that understand the context, intent, and sentiment of every customer message.
howPage.tech2Desc: The system automatically improves with every interaction, adapting to new query patterns and industry-specific terminology.
howPage.tech3Desc: Cloud infrastructure that automatically scales to handle from 10 to 10,000 simultaneous conversations without losing performance.
howPage.ctaDesc: Contact our team and we'll guide you through every step of the process.

footer.description: Intelligent AI-powered voicebot to transform your company's customer service.
